dc:title: Loaded touring bicycle beside a rural highway
dc:description: Color photograph of a quiet two-lane paved road receding into the distance through a dry rural landscape. In the left foreground, a loaded touring bicycle rests against a metal guardrail beside a concrete retaining wall, with panniers and gear attached to the rear rack. The roadway is bordered by white edge lines and a central lane marking, with scrub vegetation, trees, fencing, and rolling hills or low mountains visible in the background under a pale blue sky. The image has visible film grain and muted color characteristic of a digitized color negative.
